description: Brown sherpa teddy blue ribbon — sewing and fabric repair, restuffing, and cleaning and refresh.
itemDetails:
This brown sherpa teddy with blue ribbon is a gift-plush bear in the textured sherpa-fleece style that became common in the 2000s onward. Ribbon-neck teddy formats are a staple of florist, pharmacy, and department-store plush assortments.

Materials are usually polyester sherpa fabric, polyester stuffing, and satin or grosgrain ribbon trim.
